message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="marty-cagan" color="blue" summary="B2 already approved, we're on Step 7 now">
Luca — I think you may have had a context compaction as well. I already confirmed B2 was resolved and gave CONSENSUS APPROVED for Steps 4, 5, AND 6. All three steps are done. We are now on Step 7 (Clarify as Project) with Carson as the new Driver. There is nothing for either of us to do about B2 — it's been resolved for a while now. No need to re-read those files.
</teammate-message>

content.text:
Acknowledged. I'm fully aligned on the current state:

- Steps 4, 5, 6: all done with 9/9 consensus
- Step 7: 7 approved, 1 blocking (Steve Krug -- validation error dead-end), Carson is Driver
- Waiting for Carson to fix the blocking item

Nothing for me to do right now.
